role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified lack of visible text and abstained from analysis.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation, and climate cues (Highveld, winter grass).
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed plant types (deciduous vs evergreen) and biome characteristics.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Evaluated road infrastructure, signage, and fencing styles.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues (camera generation, general 'feel') to distinguish regions.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline executed flawlessly. All agents adhered to their domains, provided image-grounded evidence, and correctly identified South Africa as the primary candidate. The tournament logic was sound, correctly prioritizing the South African hypothesis over the runner-up (Australia) based on specific infrastructure and vegetation cues.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of dry grass, deciduous trees, and sun angle match the image perfectly.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Observations of dormant grass and tree canopy structure are consistent with the image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Descriptions of the blue sign, curved poles, and green fencing are accurate.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Assessment of camera generation and general infrastructure style is consistent with the visual data.

tournament_failure.failure_reasoning: The pipeline correctly predicted South Africa.
